setup.blurb: Connect to Things 3 for GTD task management — inbox, today, projects, areas, tags, and task creation via AppleScript and URL scheme.
setup.help_text: Things 3 must be installed from the Mac App Store. No API keys required — access is via AppleScript and the Things URL scheme.
prerequisites: AppleScript permission for terminal (auto-prompted on first use)

test.skip_reason: AppleScript-only access to Things 3 — no HTTP surface.

highlights.text: Inbox — capture and triage tasks in the Things inbox
Today — view and manage today’s focused task list
Projects — browse projects, areas, headings, and checklists
Tags — filter and organise tasks by tag
Create — add tasks with dates, tags, projects, checklists
Sync — changes sync to Things Cloud on all devices

readme:
### What it does

Things 3 gives your AI agent access to Cultured Code’s GTD task manager on macOS. Browse your inbox, today list, upcoming and someday tasks, projects, areas, and tags — and create new tasks with full metadata.

Your agent can review what’s due today, capture new tasks into the inbox, create structured projects with headings and checklists, and search across your entire task database.

### macOS integration

This plugin uses two native interfaces: AppleScript for reading Things’ database, and the Things URL scheme for creating and modifying tasks. No API keys, no cloud configuration — just Things 3 installed on your Mac.

Changes sync automatically via Things Cloud to your iPhone, iPad, and other Macs.

### Safety model

Read operations (inbox, today, projects, areas, tags, search) work immediately.

Task creation uses the Things URL scheme, which opens Things briefly to process the command. This is a native macOS interaction — no network requests involved.

### GTD workflow support

| View | What you can do |
|------|-----------------|
| Inbox | Browse and triage uncategorised captures |
| Today | See today’s focused list |
| Upcoming | Review scheduled tasks with dates |
| Someday | Browse deferred items |
| Projects | Navigate project hierarchies with headings |
| Areas | Browse areas of responsibility |
| Tags | Filter tasks by any tag |
| Logbook | Review completed tasks |

scenarios.label: Morning task triage
scenarios.body: Review the Things inbox for uncategorised captures, move items to appropriate projects with due dates and tags, then check today’s list to confirm priorities.

scenarios.label: Create a structured project from requirements
scenarios.body: Create a new Things project with headings, add tasks under each heading with due dates and checklists, and assign it to the appropriate area.

scenarios.label: Weekly review of someday items
scenarios.body: Browse the someday list to resurface deferred tasks, move relevant items to upcoming with scheduled dates, and archive anything no longer relevant.
